title: Is Unstructured Data The Key To Successful AI Deployments?
summary: A discussion from Hyland CommunityLIVE 2026 argues that unstructured data is critical for enterprise AI success and agentic systems. The speakers, including Hyland's CEO and Erie Insurance's CIO, present case studies of how unstructured data combined with proper context helps AI agents drive business impact across healthcare, banking, and insurance.
writeup: Recorded at Hyland CommunityLIVE 2026, this discussion makes the case that unstructured data is central to enterprise AI success and to agentic systems. The speakers, including Hyland's CEO and Erie Insurance's CIO, argue that unstructured data paired with proper context lets AI agents deliver business impact, illustrated through case studies in healthcare, banking, and insurance. The core takeaway: context-aware handling of unstructured data, not just structured records, is what moves agentic workflows from demos to operational results.
